_note_plan: Each row overrides key model switches for one-batch/dry-run ablation or real ChannelThermal training.
_note_decoder_mode: hyper_only = bottleneck only; +global = operating context; +direct = gated shortcut; +near = local module context; combinations isolate shortcut interactions.
_note_direct_gate: direct_residual_gate_init is a sigmoid gate probability. 0.05 makes direct residual measurable without fully opening the shortcut.
_note_num_hyperedges: Main bottleneck size. Duplicate rows with 2,4,6,8 to test organization capacity.

ablations.name: A2_direct_gate005
ablations.notes: Tests direct module/environment residual with an explicitly open 0.05 gate.

ablations.name: A3_hyper_plus_near_module
ablations.notes: Adds local near-module context without direct attention.

ablations.name: A5_hyper_plus_global_near
ablations.notes: Tests whether global plus local context explains the A4 gain without direct residual.

ablations.name: A6_hyper_plus_global_direct_gate005
ablations.notes: Tests global plus direct residual without near-module context.

ablations.name: A7_hyper_plus_near_direct_gate005
ablations.notes: Tests local plus direct residual without global context.

ablations.name: A8_current_like_direct_gate005
ablations.notes: All shortcut paths enabled with a measurable direct residual gate.

ablations.name: A9_current_like_no_Ame
ablations.notes: A8 without module-environment auxiliary shaping to test whether A_me matters.

ablations.name: A10_current_like_heat_case_relative
ablations.notes: Uses only case-relative heat features to test whether absolute heat scale is needed.

ablations.name: A11_current_like_heat_dataset_scaled
ablations.notes: Uses only dataset-scaled heat features to test whether relative within-case scaling is redundant.
